description_long: This jewelry set features a necklace and matching earrings, both composed of round, polished beads with a natural, marbled appearance in soft beige and cream tones. The necklace is strung with larger, oval-shaped beads at the front, gradually transitioning to smaller, spherical beads toward the clasp. The earrings are simple drops, each featuring a single bead that matches the necklace's design. The beads have a lustrous, slightly glossy finish, suggesting they may be made from natural shell, pearl, or a similar organic material. The set is displayed on a smooth, white bust stand, which highlights the gentle color variations and subtle shine of the beads. The overall design is elegant and understated, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A beaded necklace and matching drop earrings in marbled beige and cream tones, with a lustrous, polished finish. The set is elegant and understated, featuring natural-looking, oval and round beads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace draped on the bust and the matching earrings, highlighting the graduated bead sizes and marbled coloration.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizing the profile of the necklace, showing the roundness and arrangement of the beads along the neckline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the necklace with the smaller beads and the clasp area, with no earrings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's curvature and bead arrangement from another angle.
